control_name: Establish and Maintain Detailed Enterprise Asset Inventory
description: Establish and maintain an accurate, detailed, and up-to-date inventory of all enterprise assets.
Address unauthorized assets weekly, or more frequently.

control_name: Establish and Maintain a Software Inventory
description: Establish and maintain a detailed inventory of all licensed software.

control_name: Establish and Maintain a Data Management Process
description: Establish and maintain a data management process.

control_name: Establish and Maintain a Data Inventory
description: Establish and maintain a data inventory, based on the organization's data management process.

control_name: Establish and Maintain a Secure Configuration Process
description: Establish and maintain a secure configuration process for enterprise assets.
